notes: SPIN Evaluation Protocol — deterministic, rule-based German language analysis benchmark. Evaluates grammar rule detection, clause structure analysis, phonotactic validation, and diagnosis state classification. All components are zero-dependency, regex/rule-based, and fully reproducible.

components.description: Grammar rule detection accuracy — precision and recall of GR_RULES against annotated German text.
Clause detection accuracy — correct identification of sentence topology (simple/compound/complex/compound-complex).
Phonotactic analysis quality — detection of illegal bigrams, sonority violations, syllable weight anomalies.
Replay stability — identical outputs on identical inputs across runs.
Runtime performance — throughput, memory usage, processing time per example.
Slice reporting — performance breakdown across error categories, input lengths, and difficulty levels.

evaluation_method.description: All evaluations use deterministic regex-based rules with no stochastic components. Results are fully reproducible and auditable.
unique_differentiators: Phonotactic analysis layer (SSP-based, unique to SPIN)
Six-state diagnosis engine for sentence-level structural analysis
Deterministic by design — no randomness in evaluation
